summary: खरिदार वा सो सरह पदको पाठ्यक्रम सम्बन्धी सूचना
description: The Public Service Commission has published a notice regarding the syllabus for the post of Kharidhar or So Sarah. The revised syllabus for the open and inclusive competitive examination has already been published on the commission's website. The examination will be conducted according to this syllabus. This notice is published to inform all concerned about the syllabus.

summary: स्वीकृत नामावली सहितको परीक्षा केन्द्र प्रकाशन गररएको सूचना
description: The notice is about the publication of the exam center for the candidates who have been selected for the exam. The exam is scheduled to take place on २०७८।११।११ at २:०० बजे. The candidates are required to report to the exam center at the specified time. The notice also provides the details of the exam center and the room number for each candidate.

The Public Service Commission of Nepal has announced the interview schedule for the post of Sub Engineer. The interview will be held on 2079/01/04 at 11:00 AM. The selected candidates are required to bring their documents and certificates to the interview. The commission has also informed that the interview will be conducted in Pokhara.

summary: जेष्ठता र कायनसम्पादन मूल्याङ्कनद्वारा हुने बढुवाको सूचना
description: The Public Service Commission of Nepal has announced vacancies for various positions, including supervisors, inspectors, and computer operators. The vacancies are open to candidates who have completed their secondary education and have relevant work experience. The application deadline is 2082/12/03, and the selection process will be based on seniority and performance evaluation.

The Public Service Commission has announced the schedule for various exams, including the security service and general service exams, which will be held from 2076 Chaitra 15 to 2076 Chaitra 26. The exams were previously postponed due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The commission has now decided to conduct the exams as per the original schedule.

summary: रा.प. तृतीय श्रेणी (प्राधिधिक) तथा स्वास्थ्य सेिाका आठौं र सातौं तहका पिको आ.प्र., िुिा तथा समावेशी  प्रद्वतयोद्वगतात्मक द्विखित परीक्षा
description: The Public Service Commission of Nepal is conducting a written examination for various positions, including technical and health services. The exam will be held from 2076.11.28 to 2076.12.25 at different centers in Kathmandu. Candidates are required to bring their admit card, citizenship certificate, and other necessary documents to the exam center.
